claims.comparison_population: T2D postmenopausal women vs postmenopausal controls (CTRL)
claims.supporting_quote: Bone gene expression analysis revealed increased tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF-α; p<0.0001) and reduced adiponectin (ADIPOQ; p=0.0041) in T2D. ... serum cytokine analysis showed increased inflammation, with higher TNF-α (p=0.0084) and lower ADIPOQ (p=0.0402) levels in T2D ... compared to CTRL.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available for automated Stage4b in this environment).
